text: There is an odd sense of transition here. Passing from the sterile, glass-walled meeting room with its hushed voices into this space of vibrant color and declarative text, I feel both anticipation and curiosity. The environment urges me to ponder the intersections of humanity and technology, research and development—how our ideas are shaped by the settings that host them. Surrounded by these bold visual cues and thoughtful words, I’m reminded of the persistent human drive to create meaning, even in the most structured places.
